name: Google Chat App
description: This app integrate services with Google Chat and manage Chat resources such as i.e messages. Remmeber that user will need authentication code, check Github or SplunkBase for information on how to obtain it

actions.name: Create Message
actions.description: Creates a message in a Google Chat space

parameters.name: parent_space
parameters.description: The resource name of the space in which to create a message. Remember parent has match pattern: /^spaces/[^/]+$/

parameters.name: requestid
parameters.description: A unique request ID for this message. Specifying an existing request ID returns the message created with that ID instead of creating a new message

parameters.name: messagereplyoption
parameters.description: Specifies whether a message starts a thread or replies to one. Only supported in named spaces

parameters.name: messageid
parameters.description: A custom ID for a message

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Resource name of the message. Remember name has match pattern: /^spaces/[^/]+/messages/[^/]+$/. Example: spaces/koB0FMAAAAE/messages/dd0BuBH2QzM.dd0BuBH2QzM
